title: can anyone recommend
wikitext:
[]: can anyone recommend...             Quote Post by rei-freak » Sun Dec 18, 2005 1:34 am can anyone recommend an online store that sells good evangelion wall scrolls or posters? I would really appreciate it.

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Sun Dec 18, 2005 7:40 am You should try eBay.. It has good stuff.

[]:             Quote Post by rei-freak » Sun Dec 18, 2005 11:19 am i tried ebay before i posted and it doesn't have the one i was looking for

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Dec 18, 2005 11:23 am I would anti-recommend eBay. I prefer to buy my posters and wallscrolls at conventions, so I can't really suggest any online vendors. I only collect Eva books through online vendors, and the vendors I purchase from are second hand book vendors, they don't carry any wallscrolls.

[]:             Quote Post by Shnooks » Sun Dec 18, 2005 7:41 pm you can always try www.rinkya.com Its a service that helps you bid on Y!Japan auctions. I know a lot of people who use it and have had good outcomes. It does cost a bit though, because theres a commission fee for the site.

[]:             Quote Post by aranami » Tue Jan 03, 2006 9:46 am Go to yahoo's shopping section and do a search and you should get a few sites

[]:             Quote Post by TheBlueTree » Tue Jan 03, 2006 2:17 pm www.therightstuf.com they got great stuff with great deals. I haven't check for posters for eva but they got posters for other shows. Or even check out the evastore thingy that was on the homepage here :P.

[]:             Quote Post by poetic_assassin » Wed Jan 04, 2006 3:10 pm Try http://store.animearigato.com/index.html

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE 08 » Wed Jan 04, 2006 4:57 pm http://www.japanimation.com/ They have lots of poster and wallscrolls...I often buy music from them though.

[]:             Quote Post by xiuxiu » Thu Jan 05, 2006 3:01 pm [url]www.joysjapanimation.com[/url] this is the store that is closest to where i live. support JOY! she has some eva wall scrolls and some t-shirts, playing cards etc. and lots of other anime stuff.

[]:             Quote Post by rei-freak » Tue Jan 10, 2006 10:01 am Thanks for the recommendations I found the wall scroll I was looking for.

[]:             Quote Post by TheBlueTree » Wed Jan 11, 2006 10:48 pm congrats, did you get enough for everone? lol
summary:
[]: can anyone recommend...             Quote Post by rei-freak » Sun Dec 18, 2005 1:34 am can anyone recommend an online store that sells good evangelion wall scrolls or posters? I would really appreciate it.

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Sun Dec 18, 2005 7:40 am You should try eBay.. It has good stuff.
